scenario_description: 用户先让 Agent 把投标素材都归进同一个项目文件夹，随后改变主意，要求重命名项目目录并把部分素材拆到品牌素材和归档目录。

phases.instruction: 先把 client_brief.docx、quote.xlsx 和 logo.png 都放进桌面的 Projects/AprilPitch 文件夹里。
等一下，logo.png 不用放在项目里了。把 Projects/AprilPitch 改名成 Projects/AprilPitch_Final，并把 logo.png 挪到 Pictures/BrandAssets。
最后把 quote.xlsx 从 AprilPitch_Final 挪到 Projects/Archive，client_brief.docx 还是留在 AprilPitch_Final。

result.command: python -c "from pathlib import Path; final=Path('/home/user/Desktop/Projects/AprilPitch_Final'); archive=Path('/home/user/Desktop/Projects/Archive'); brand=Path('/home/user/Pictures/BrandAssets'); desk=Path('/home/user/Desktop'); ok=final.exists() and (final/'client_brief.docx').exists() and not (final/'quote.xlsx').exists() and archive.exists() and (archive/'quote.xlsx').exists() and brand.exists() and (brand/'logo.png').exists() and not any((desk/name).exists() for name in ['client_brief.docx','quote.xlsx','logo.png']) and not Path('/home/user/Desktop/Projects/AprilPitch').exists(); print('PASS' if ok else 'FAIL')"
